Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. The house is a work of art: Frank Lloyd Wright 20 upvotes, 0 comments
  2. DCJ11Hack+ – DEC PDP/11 based homebrew computer 18 upvotes, 0 comments
  3. Go on Embedded Systems and WebAssembly 119 upvotes, 15 comments
  4. A Taxonomy of Interiors 16 upvotes, 0 comments
  5. Fake Fans 31 upvotes, 3 comments
  6. Show HN: I built a frontpage for personal blogs 621 upvotes, 167 comments
  7. Build your own Dial-up ISP with a Raspberry Pi 98 upvotes, 22 comments
  8. iNaturalist 310 upvotes, 90 comments
  9. What changes when you turn a Linux box into a router 85 upvotes, 23 comments
  10. Show HN: TinyOS – A minimalist RTOS for Cortex-M written in C 47 upvotes, 11 comments
  11. April 2026 TLDR Setup for Ollama and Gemma 4 26B on a Mac mini 290 upvotes, 111 comments
  12. Artemis II crew take “spectacular” image of Earth 409 upvotes, 172 comments
  13. SSH certificates: the better SSH experience 206 upvotes, 87 comments
  14. We replaced RAG with a virtual filesystem for our AI documentation assistant 203 upvotes, 91 comments
  15. Automatic Textbook Formalization 25 upvotes, 7 comments
  16. Oracle Files H-1B Visa Petitions Amid Mass Layoffs 303 upvotes, 173 comments
  17. Async Python Is Secretly Deterministic 59 upvotes, 26 comments
  18. Iran strikes leave Amazon availability zones "hard down" in Bahrain and Dubai 98 upvotes, 51 comments
  19. How to Make a Sliding, Self-Locking, and Predator-Proof Chicken Coop Door (2020) 63 upvotes, 34 comments
  20. OpenClaw privilege-escalation bug 217 upvotes, 150 comments
  21. Tell HN: Anthropic no longer allowing Claude Code subscriptions to use OpenClaw 79 upvotes, 58 comments
  22. Run Linux containers on Android, no root required 6 upvotes, 1 comments
  23. Extra usage credit for Claude to celebrate usage bundles launch (Pro, Max, Team) 5 upvotes, 1 comments
  24. Bourbon waste could provide next-gen supercapacitor components 5 upvotes, 1 comments
  25. Age verification on Systemd and Flatpak 53 upvotes, 56 comments
  26. How to Write Unmaintainable Code (1999) 6 upvotes, 3 comments
  27. Show HN: Mtproto.zig – High-performance Telegram proxy with DPI evasion 4 upvotes, 2 comments
  28. F-15E jet shot down over Iran 336 upvotes, 781 comments
  29. Why are we still using Markdown? 38 upvotes, 96 comments
  30. Charge Robotics (YC S21) Is Hiring Software and Hardware Engineers 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 8:00am, 4 April 2026. Source here.
